LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION INFORMATION CENTER (EPIC), CENTER FOR BIOLOGICAL DIVERSITY'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANT REQUEST FOR HEARING. COURT STAYS ACTION PER STIPULATION. ALL FURTHER APPLICATIONS FOR RELIEF TO BE MADE TO JUDGE GOLDSMITH IN DEPARTMENT 613. HE IS THE DESIGNATED CEQA JUDGE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Request For Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate; Notice Of Request For Hearing [Pub Res Code 21167.4]
Off Calendar Aug-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION INFORMATION CENTER (EPIC), CENTER FOR BIOLOGICAL DIVERSITY'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Grant request for hearing. Court stays action per stipulation. All further applications for relief to be made to Judge Goldsmith in Department 613. He is the designated CEQA judge. (Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order.) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
